properties: Spiesia proboscidea, also known as the sweet cicely, has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its therapeutic properties. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The plant's roots and seeds have been used in traditional remedies to treat a range of health issues, including indigestion and bloating. parts: Spiesia proboscidea, also known as the Indian sneezewort or sneezeweed, is a plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. The plant's roots are commonly used to treat respiratory issues, such as colds, coughs, and bronchitis, due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
